procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1027
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1027 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1027 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1027'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1027 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1
runs.stdout:
PathToAtomicsFolder = /opt/atomic-red-team/atomics

GetPrereq's for: T1027-1 Decode base64 Data into Script

Prereq successfully met: encode the command into base64 file

Executing test: T1027-1 Decode base64 Data into Script

#1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Debian 6.12.74-2~bpo12+1 (2026-03-13)
Exit code: 0

sigma.title: Suspicious Filename with Embedded Base64 Commands
Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation - PowerShell Module

osquery.name: t1027_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1027_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;
